description: Accounting for an India trader, in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe? Mentions goods such as hyacinth and pepper, and their quantities, and many other goods; also mentions the customs in Qūṣ and the agents of the Ṣināʿa. (Information in part from CUDL.) Likely related to T-S AS 153.79 (PGPID 34987). Also similar appearing are T-S AS 204.99 (PGPID 32045) and T-S AS 210.175 (PGPID 22814).
tags: India Book unedited, ib-addenda, account, IB7
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
